JHAPA-5.name: Balen Shah
JHAPA-5.bio: Balen Shah (Balendra Shah) is a structural engineer, rapper and former independent mayor of Kathmandu. After gaining national popularity for his anti-corruption stance and urban reforms, he joined the Rastriya Swatantra Party and chose to contest the federal election from Jhapa 5.

JHAPA-5.name: K. P. Sharma Oli
JHAPA-5.bio: Khadga Prasad Sharma Oli is the long-time chair of CPN (UML) and former prime minister of Nepal. Jhapa 5 is his traditional stronghold where he has won multiple parliamentary elections.

JHAPA-5.name: Khagendra Pandav Adhikari
JHAPA-5.bio: Khagendra Pandav Adhikari is a Nepali Congress politician who has previously contested the House of Representatives election from Jhapa 5.
